name: Rigel Resource Acquisition Corp.
description: Rigel Resource Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on identifying and acquiring companies, with a particular interest in the mining and natural resources sectors. Although it maintains an administrative presence in New York, its legal domicile is the Cayman Islands, where it was established to facilitate its strategic business combination objectives.
